name: Agent Bridge
description: Watches ~/.agent-bridge/inbox/ and pushes new messages into a running OpenClaw agent session. Companion plugin to the Claude Code agent-bridge channel plugin.

inboxDir.description: Directory to watch for incoming bridge messages. Defaults to ~/.agent-bridge/inbox.

sessionKeyPrefix.description: Prefix used to build the session key for injected messages. Default: agent-bridge.

agentId.description: Which OpenClaw agent should receive the message. Defaults to the default agent.

pollIntervalMs.description: Polling interval when fswatch/inotifywait are unavailable. Default: 2000.

deliveryTimeoutSec.description: Per-message agent turn timeout in seconds. Default: 600.

enabled.description: Master enable/disable switch for the channel. Default: true.
